title: galium anglicum var. parisiense
intro: Galium anglicum var. parisiense, also known as Paris Milkwort, is a perennial plant species within the gentian family, native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural remedy for urinary tract infections. Galium anglicum var. parisiense can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, often used in traditional medicine, and is also available in dried form for teas and capsules.
